why_sufficient: Frame3 is an isolated new component; App.tsx only needs import + element addition.
summary: Create Frame3 as a scroll-driven expansion component: a rounded rectangle anchored at the bottom that grows from ~48vh to ~78vh tall as the user scrolls, with background interpolating from warm-gray to mint-green. Wire it into App.tsx after Frame2. Update App.test.tsx children count. All files are within the approved scope.
